description: Lang-pack validation: `node scripts/generate-pseudo-locales.cjs && node scripts/validate-translations.cjs` passes for all 9 locales after each namespace update (covers key parity, missing/extra keys, interpolation variables, pseudo-locale patterns, Italian accents). Single check, run on every commit.
Unit: ProjectDetail.i18n.test — tabs, budget/hours labels, phase section headers rendered via t() in en and xx pseudo-locale
Unit: TaskForm.i18n.test — all field labels, placeholders, validation errors render via t(); pseudo-locale covers all visible strings
Unit: TaskForm.i18n.test — toast messages (save success, save failure, validation failure) render translated
Unit: PhaseTaskImportDialog.i18n.test — CSV preview, validation errors, import progress translated
Unit: Projects.i18n.test — list filters, search placeholder, empty state, status tabs translated
Unit: TaskDocumentsSimple.i18n.test — upload/attach/download controls and empty state translated

Unit: TaskDependencies.i18n.test — add/remove dependencies, blocking indicators, cycle warnings translated
Unit: ProjectMaterialsDrawer.i18n.test — materials list, add dialog, cost labels, delete confirm translated
Unit: ProjectTaskExportDialog.i18n.test — format options, column picker, download toast translated
Unit: ProjectQuickAdd.i18n.test — dialog labels, validation; renders correctly both standalone and within QuickCreateDialog context
Unit: ProjectDetailsEdit.i18n.test — edit form fields, save/cancel buttons translated
Unit: PrefillFromTicketDialog.i18n.test — field mapping labels, prefill confirmation translated
Unit: TaskListView.i18n.test — column headers, inline edit prompts, bulk actions translated

Unit: TemplateEditor.i18n.test — editor title, section headers, save/publish/delete actions, validation translated
Unit: TemplateTaskForm.i18n.test — template task form fields and validation translated
Unit: TemplateTasksStep.i18n.test — wizard step 3 (tasks) labels and nav translated

Unit: ProjectTemplatesList.i18n.test — column headers (Name/Description/Category/Times Used/Last Used/Actions), search placeholder, filter, delete confirm translated
Unit: CreateTemplateDialog.i18n.test — create-from-project dialog translated
Unit: TemplateTaskListView.i18n.test — template task list columns and inline actions translated
Unit: TemplateReviewStep.i18n.test — wizard review summary sections and labels translated
Unit: TemplatePhasesStep.i18n.test — wizard phases step translated
Unit: CreateTemplateForm.i18n.test — create template form body translated
Unit: TemplateDetail.i18n.test — detail sidebar labels translated
Unit: TemplateClientPortalStep.i18n.test — client portal exposure toggle translated

Integration: /msp/projects list loads in en with no hardcoded English visible in list/filter chrome
Integration: /msp/projects list loads in de with translated filters, search, empty state
Integration: /msp/projects/[id] detail page renders in de — tabs, phases, tasks, budget/hours, kanban, materials drawer all translated
Integration: task create/edit flow on /msp/projects/[id] renders TaskForm in de with translated fields, validation, and toast messages
Integration: task dependency add/remove flow renders TaskDependencies in de with translated blocking indicators and cycle warnings
Integration: /msp/projects/templates list renders in de with translated columns and filters
Integration: /msp/projects/templates/[id] editor renders in de — TemplateEditor, TemplateTaskForm, phase manager all translated
Integration: /msp/projects/templates/create wizard (5 steps) renders in de with translated step titles, nav buttons, review summary
Integration: verify /msp/projects/templates routes load features/projects namespace (via best-match to /msp/projects or explicit entry added in F005)
Integration: /msp/settings/project-settings renders ProjectSettings + ProjectStatusSettings + TenantProjectTaskStatusSettings + AddStatusDialog in de
Integration: global quick-create dialog (ProjectQuickAdd reused in layout/QuickCreateDialog) renders translated in de
Integration: task-ticket link flow (LinkTicketToTaskDialog, CreateTaskFromTicketDialog) renders translated in de from both /msp/tickets and /msp/projects sides
Integration: apply-template flow renders ApplyTemplateDialog in de with translated project selection and success toast
Integration: xx pseudo-locale smoke test across /msp/projects list, detail, templates, template editor, wizard, settings — pseudo-text everywhere, no bare English
Regression: existing project unit tests (PhaseListItem, ProjectTaskStatusSettings, TemplateStatusManager, TemplateStatusColumnsStep, TaskComment) still pass — these were already wired
Regression: task dependency tests, kanban drag-drop tests, task form tests pass after wiring
Regression: template wizard end-to-end test (basics → phases → tasks → review → client-portal → create) passes
Regression: client-portal project views unchanged (no regression in packages/client-portal/src/components/projects/* which was already 100% wired)
Regression: CreateTaskFromTicketDialog integration with ticket-side flow unchanged
Manual: visual diff on /msp/projects/[id] in en — no layout shifts from key length differences in phase/task panels
Manual: visual diff on /msp/projects/[id] in de — long German strings do not break TaskForm/TaskCard widths or kanban column headers
Manual: template wizard visual check in de — step titles and nav buttons fit without wrapping/overflow
